creator: Lena@lena.kiev.ua
text:
Hi Thomas,

You asked Eugene Grosbein:

> could you please elaborate a little on the significance of this patch.

The  http://loadup.ru  video-sharing site (like youtube.com)
doesn't work with Flash 7. Flash 9 is unstable with native Firefox
under FreeBSD. The only remaining way to view any of 120 thousand
videos on that site is to download the video as a .3gp file created
using AMR audio codec. Before Eugene's patch I couldn't hear anything
(the message: "Cannot find codec 'amr_nb' in libavcodec...").
After applying the patch (in /usr/ports/multimedia/mplayer,
`make config` to enable AMR and `portupgrade -f mplayer`) I can.

That's besides Eugene's mobile phone with a videocamera
which makes such videos. I suppose that he is not the only one
with such phone. :)

> there is a
> vast number of different files/series/versions/patches/tarballs on this
> 3GPP ftp. This tarball you picked, I suppose you had specific reasons?

I have few local sites in MASTER_SITE_OVERRIDE because traffic from
local sites is free for me. One of them happened to have exactly these
two files in the FreeBSD directory:

~ $ ftp ftp.univ.kiev.ua
...
ftp> cd pub/FreeBSD/distfiles
250 CWD command successful
ftp> dir 2*
229 Entering Extended Passive Mode (|||57048|)
150 Opening ASCII mode data connection for file list
-rw-r--r--   1 root     wheel      718741 Mar 22  2007 20292-kmastermind-2.2.tar.bz2
-rw-r--r--   1 root     wheel      467658 Mar 22  2007 20798-tiblit-1.2.tar.bz2
-rw-r--r--   1 root     wheel     1041864 Apr 28  2006 2430DL_sc_linux.tar.gz
-rw-r--r--   1 root     wheel      303856 Jun 21 07:40 26104-700.zip
-rw-r--r--   1 root     wheel      255757 Mar 29  2007 26204-700.zip
-rw-r--r--   1 root     wheel      417876 Mar 22  2007 27913-PolarCursorThemes.tar.bz2
-rw-r--r--   1 root     wheel       68777 Mar 22  2007 28310-neutral-1.13a.tar.gz
-rw-r--r--   1 root     wheel      114764 Aug 22  1999 2Step-8.0.5pl1-patch.gz
-rw-r--r--   1 root     wheel     1033962 May 16  2005 2dhf-05.05.tgz
226 Transfer complete

Checksums matched. So, these two files 26104-700.zip and 26204-700.zip
already are used somewhere else under FreeBSD.

Lena
